name: A-135-3
subtitle: Voltage Controlled Stereo Mixer
summary: Four-input voltage-controlled stereo mixer built around eight linear CEM3360/AS3360 VCAs in 8 HP. Each channel has a level knob, a CV input with attenuator, and independent left and right signal inputs. DC coupled throughout — usable for audio and CV mixing alike. Multiple units can be chained master/slave for more than four channels.
